reason: Backend service ownership and pre-development checklist for services/document implementation.
Service-local Go module layout and directory responsibilities for services/document.
Gateway-first RESTful API contract, response envelope, owner service, and context header rules.
PostgreSQL, migration, transaction, MinIO, and repository rules for document-owned persistence.
Stable error categories and propagation rules for handlers and services.
Structured logging and sensitive-data restrictions for jobs, MCP calls, and MinIO operations.
Service-local build, test, and implementation quality requirements.
Cross-layer field mapping and data flow checks across gateway, service, database, MinIO, and MCP.
